# Synced from RYSEN — do not edit

These files are copied automatically from [ShaYmez/RYSEN](https://github.com/ShaYmez/RYSEN) (`ipsc` branch) by [`.github/workflows/sync-from-rysen.yml`](../.github/workflows/sync-from-rysen.yml).

| File | RYSEN path |
|------|------------|
| `ipsc_proxy.py` | `ipsc_proxy.py` |
| `ipsc_const.py` | `ipsc_const.py` |
| `ipsc-proxy-SAMPLE.cfg` | `ipsc-proxy-SAMPLE.cfg` |

`tests/test_ipsc_proxy.py` at repo root is synced from `tests/test_ipsc_proxy.py` in RYSEN.

Develop proxy logic in **RYSEN only**. Refresh this repo via **Actions → Sync from RYSEN**, `repository_dispatch`, or the daily scheduled sync.

Current RYSEN commit: see [`.rysen-sha`](.rysen-sha).
